name: Shaft Access Key
description: A ring of heavy keys from the foreman's safe. Opens secured areas in the upper levels.

name: Shaft Master's Key
description: A heavy key stamped with the DeepVein company seal. Opens the blast door to the deep vault.

name: Miner's Helm
description: A reinforced mining helmet with a cracked lamp. Still offers decent protection from overhead strikes.

name: Steamforged Blade
description: A sword tempered by pressurized steam. The edge glows faintly with residual heat. Cuts deeper than cold steel.

name: Pneumatic Crossbow
description: A crossbow driven by compressed steam. The bolts punch through armor with terrifying force.

name: Voltaic Staff
description: A staff wound with copper coils that crackle with residual charge. Each strike risks shocking the target senseless.

name: Piston Daggers
description: Twin daggers with spring-loaded grips that drive the blade deeper with each thrust. Wickedly fast.

name: Steamplate Armor
description: Heavy plate armor reinforced with steam-treated alloy. The metal flexes slightly under pressure instead of shattering.

name: Forged Visor
description: A helm crafted by the mine's automatons. The visor's slits are precisely calculated for maximum visibility with minimum exposure.

name: Pressure Gauntlets
description: Gauntlets fitted with hydraulic pistons from the mine's machinery. Each punch carries the force of a steam hammer.

name: Core Fragment Ring
description: A ring set with a shard of construct core. It pulses with mechanical precision, sharpening both body and mind.

name: Construct Core
description: A fist-sized sphere of unknown material, pulsing with faint energy. Extracted from a destroyed automaton. Scholars and collectors pay well for these.

name: Ancient Gear
description: A precision-machined gear from a construct's innards. The alloy is unlike anything modern smiths can produce.

name: Steam Crystal
description: A crystallized residue from the mine's deepest steam vents. It radiates heat even in freezing air.

name: Sentinel Fragment
description: A piece of the Iron Sentinel's chassis. The metal still hums with residual power. Extremely valuable.

name: Sentinel's Hammer
description: A weapon forged from the Iron Sentinel's own arm. The metal is warm to the touch and hums with latent power. Nothing made by human hands compares.

name: Sentinel's Chassis
description: Armor plating stripped from the Sentinel's torso. Impossibly light for its density. The violet glow has faded, but the protection hasn't.

name: Sentinel's Crest
description: The helm-crest of the Iron Sentinel. Wearing it feels like borrowing the gaze of something ancient and patient.

name: Sentinel's Grips
description: Gauntlets from the Sentinel's hands. The hydraulic grip adjusts automatically — gentle enough to hold a quill, strong enough to crush stone.

name: Builder's Signet
description: A ring of unknown metal bearing the mark of the pre-Collapse builders. When worn, you feel a strange kinship with the constructs — their movements become predictable, their attacks easier to read.
